title: haplopappus spinulosus subsp. laevis
intro: Haplopappus spinulosus subsp. laevis, also known as smooth bristle thistle, is a plant species belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The smooth bristle thistle is known to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and supporting digestive health. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant properties.
